title: BTS is back: Anti-drone systems and 260,000 fans as world's biggest band returns
summary_full: RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook will perform together for the first time since October 2022.
summary_public: RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook will perform together for the first time since October 2022.
